## Summary

What does this PR change and why? If linked to an issue: `Closes #N`.

## Type

- [ ] New feature (new command, new flag, new transport)
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Refactor (no behaviour change)
- [ ] Tooling / CI / docs
- [ ] Breaking change (requires major bump + migration notes)

## Checklist

- [ ] `pnpm lint` passes
- [ ] `pnpm typecheck` passes
- [ ] `pnpm test` passes (coverage ≥ 80%)
- [ ] `pnpm build` succeeds
- [ ] Conventional Commits respected
- [ ] Changeset added (`pnpm changeset`)
- [ ] SPDX headers present in new files
- [ ] REUSE compliance OK
- [ ] Strict TDD: tests were written before the code

## Test plan

Describe how the changes were tested (commands run, fixtures, manual checks, stdio MCP handshake against a real AI client if relevant).
